fileTabs.content:
SELECT
      *,
      row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) AS `id_39`
    FROM Summarize_37

expression.expression: CAST((CONCAT('10137', (SUBSTRING( (CONCAT('00000000', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT_NUMBER(CAST(DynCliTitAPNumPer AS DOUBLE), 0)), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')))), (((LENGTH((CONCAT('00000000', (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT_NUMBER(CAST(DynCliTitAPNumPer AS DOUBLE), 0)), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')))))) - 8) + 1), 8)))) AS string)
(LAG(numero_contrato_inversiones, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY prophecy_row_id NULLS FIRST))
